feed.title: SAP Community - SAP BW/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP BW/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Shell Conversion - Remodeling of Aggregation Levels
entry.content:
Dear,

for a Shell Conversion I made the precheck of the BW-Objects with transaction RSB4HCONV (Transfer Cockpit). The BW where i made the check is a BW 7.5 on Hana.

One message of the precheck regarding the doings "before Transfer" is about aggregation levels.

There is a check message that says that the aggregation level needs to be remodelled. The reason for this is that the aggregation level has an infocube as its basis (in which navigation attributes are used). The note on remodelling https://me.sap.com/notes/2443001/E says that a multiprovider/composite provider must be built on the Infocube and the aggregation level must be built on this (before conversion). If a multiprovider/composite provider is built on the infocube and new aggregation levels are copied from the old ones, the new aggregation levels get new technical names.

Has anyone already had experience of how best to carry out this remodelling of aggregation levels? Because if there are new aggregation levels with new technical names, the queries based on the old aggregation levels will no longer work. This will also cause problems in the SAC, right?

Thanks,

Thomas

#BW4 Conversion, #Shell Conversion, #BW4HANA, #Aggregation Level

entry.title: BW/4HANA Task Chain Log Table
entry.content:
Hello BW-Experts,

Is there a log table where the completion status of BW task-chain work is kept? >We cannot obtain information at which stage the BW task chain receives an error.

Many thanks in advance!

entry.title: Display hierarchies in BW4 for authorization relevant characteristics
entry.content:
Dear colleagues,

I have a question 🙂

We have multiple hierarchies created for 0COMP_CODE. The characterisitc 0COMP_CODE is authorization relevant. And the corresponding analysis authorizations cover single values. They do not cover hierarchy authorizations.

The requirement we have: an user, who is authorized for e.g. company code 0200, should be able to see the whole hierarchy (from root node, down the tree to the node, where the company code is assigend). At the same time, I need to guarantee, that only values for authorized company codes are shown. 

Is this somehow possible?

System: BW/4HANA 2023 SP2

Thank you very much!

Kamil

entry.title: How to add a calculated field to HCPR?
entry.content:
Hello to all of you,

How to create a calculated field in my Composite Provider, when the additional functions in the context menu aren't available? Should I activate any feature in Eclipse?

 Kind Regards,
HH

entry.title: How to access comments in BW/4HANA for reporting purposes
entry.content:
I have used the commenting function in #BW/4HANA for data point comments in a query. Technically, the document store object is used. The following image shows my architecture

I have recorded two comments. Now I would like to evaluate the comments in a separate report or process them with machine learning later.

 

The question now is how I can access the comments in the #BW/4HANA backend. When I look at the data (tables via SE11) in DSO /1BW/DOAHD5Z, I see all the data around the comment, but not the comment itself.

 

The question now is, in which table or where are the comments themselves stored and how can I access them to build a report based on them. The report shall give me only all comments.

entry.title: BW4HANA Open hub data for "JPY", "IDR" currency is not converted by default to external format
entry.content:
Hi BW4HANA experts. 

We are implementing BW4HANA. 

We have connected S/4HANA to BW4HANA. S/4HANA is our operational system and BW4HANA is our data hub. Through BW4HANA, we provide data transmission to various local systems for consumption of data. 

This data is related to logistics, finance & accounting and various other commercial transactions. 

For amount fields, wherever currency is "JPY", the figures are sending without doing external format conversion. 

for example In database, 142.00 is stored with currency "JPY". At the time of transmission through openhub, to third party system, is going as 142.00(Issue). Whereas the actual transaction amount is 14200(expectation)  with currency "JPY". 

So please guide us through SAP standard method, how to fix this situation. 

 

Thank you in advance. 

 

Regards

Manish Kesharwani

entry.title: Calculation View - UPG BW4HANA 2021
entry.content:
After the upgrade to BW4HANA 2021, the Calculation Views on the system failed.

We can't even create new Calculation Views by recalling the Composite BWs in the Projections.
This is what it looks like:

Furthermore, if I try to do a Data Preview on the previously created Composite I can see the data correctly, if I try to do a Data Preview in the projection of the Calculation View I receive the following error:

I would like to point out that before the release upgrade everything was working

Thanks

Best Regards 

Francesco

entry.title: Data source Enhancement for the 2lis_02_SCL with BADI
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Kindly please help me to enhance the data source 2lis_02_SCL Data source from the table EKES field EINDT where Confirmation Category (EBTYP) = 'AB'. 

let me know how to write the BADI code.

 

Thanks and Regards,

Venkat.

entry.title: Azure Databricks Database integration with Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Is it possible to connect and poll Azure Databricks Database and fetch the records by executing query statement? Once the records are fetched using SAP Datssphere then later SAP Integration Suite(Cloud Integration) should be able to pull the data from Datasphere? what are the possible options that SAP Integration Suite(Cloud Integration) can pull the data from Datasphere? Could you please guide me on steps and pre-requisites to achieve this requirement using Datasphere?

Thanks

Ramu

entry.title: Refresh customer exit variable in BPC planning filter
entry.content:
Hi experts, 

when working with SAP Analytics Cloud on a BPC live connection, sometimes the following behavior occurs: 

I have a BPC planning sequence which is triggered from a SAC story. The planning sequence contains multiple planning functions and filters. One of the filters contains a customer exit variable which reads a parameter from a backend table. The same variable is part of the query which is used for the user input. 

When the SAC application is started, the CE variables in the planning filter are processed and are filled with values. The user will change the selection in the SAC story which leads to a change of the parameter in the backend table. The query (and the CE variable in the query) is reprocessed, reads the new value for the parameter from the backend table and displays the correct data. But then saving the user input, the planning functions throws an error due to missing reference data. When debugging, whe can see that the CE variable in the planning filter still contains the old parameter value and was not reprocessed on execution of the planning sequence. 

When viewing the planning sequence in RSPLAN, we can see that the option "reprocess variables" is active. How do I manage to reprocess the CE variables in a planning filter everytime the sequence gets executed? 

Thanks in advance, 

Marius

entry.title: S/4 Source Archiving impact on BW ACDOCA Streaming
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We have ACDOCA Streaming in BW/4HANA, it is a delta fetch on the extractor '0FI_ACDOCA_10'

Extraction properties: Overwrite delta with deletion (Delta Que).

Adapter: Extraction from SAP System by Operational Data Provisioning.

Team is planning to Archive data (older than 2 years) from ACDOCA table in S/4 HANA source system.

I am trying to understand the impact of Archiving in source system on BW/4HANA ADSO and streaming process. If there will be any change required in streaming configuration or if anyone has experience performance issue at first when the archiving at source system was first implemented.

entry.title: Replicate Standard BW Datasources only for specific controlling area
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm working on a S4HANA system configured with multiple company codes and controlling areas as well. There is a requirement to extract data to a BW system using some CO standard datasources like 0CO_OM_WBS_1 for instance.

But there is a premise that the BW system must only extract data for one controlling area, not for all. 

I'm thinking in create a custom exit for the datasource and delete all data where the controlling are is not the one allowed. This may works but I want to know from the community if there is a better more "beautiful" solution.

 

Kind regards,

Thiago

entry.title: Issue with Loading Data for i_CostCenter and I_WBSElementData_2 in BW/4HANA - DS Empty
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I’m encountering a strange issue in BW/4HANA when loading data for I_CostCenter and I_WBSElementData_2. The data source appears empty, even though I can confirm there is data in the S/4HANA system. I’ve also checked this using the program RODPS_REPL_TEST , and the data is present.

Interestingly, for I_CostCenterText, I_ProfitCenter or I_GLAccountLineItemRawData, I can retrieve data without any issues.

Has anyone experienced this issue before? It’s not an authorization problem, as there are no authorization logs indicating any failures.

Thank you in advance for your help!

Best regards,

Cristina

entry.title: Do not update delta pointer if not changed since the last update.
entry.content:
Hi Experts.

I have created a data source in ECC which delta is based on a time stamp field.

The data source feeds from a custom table in the same system which is updated every five minutes with IDOC information (EDIDC, EDIDS, EDID4) via custom program (job).

During pick hours this job may take up to 3 hours per execution. But usually 5 min should be enough.

In BW the delta upload is scheduled also every 5 min. However during pick hours the delta keeps running every 5 min and since it does not find any changes in the database it brings nothing from the source. However the delta pointer is updated in source system, and it will keep being updating for 3 hours more bringing no data.

Once the 3 hours job execution is finished in source system, the next delta execution works fine but with the wrong delta pointer. The problem is that during those 3 hours the delta pointer has been updated in the source system and it is skipping all records updated during those 3 hours creating a gap in the upload to BW.

Before changing the delta pointer to a "numeric" pointer, may I ask: Is there any way via user exit to control the delta pointer update in source system as saying: "if there is no change in the delta since the last update do not update data pointer". That way once the 3 hours pick are over, the next delta will pick up in the latest valid pointer without skipping records.

Thanks for your comments.

entry.title: 0fi_accdoca_10 enhancement
entry.content:
Hello Exports,

I need to enhance the 0FI_ACCDOCA_10 with filed vkbur_PA its already available in the Extract structure in se11, but when i am checking in Data source extract structure, not able to find the filed.

Could you please help me how to enable that filed into DataSource then transform to BW.

 

Thanks and Regards,

Venkat.

entry.title: BW4/HANA SDA Datasource Properties
entry.content:
In which table/object I can find the link between Datasource name and related virtual table for query access? I can access table using SQL console, but since during the Datasource transport its name will change (like PSA table in older versions) I need a place in which retrieve its name in any environment.

Thanks

Best regards

Dario Balice

entry.title: DTP Load Failure due to Overflow converting Issue
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am trying to load DTP on BW4HANA platform ,but DTP is failing due to overflow converting issue.

The same DTP works fine when i selective load the data but when i full load ,its failing .

below is the error message.

Not able to exactly find out erroneous records ,so its becoming very tough to extract the data.

Expecting quick response.

Thanks in advance,

Rajeev

entry.title: Scheduled AfO report does not generate statistics in SE16 > RSDDSTAT_OLAP
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts

we have noticed that scheduled AfO reports, sometimes, don't generate statistics in SE16 > RSDDSTAT_OLAP

We would like to see everytime that a certain SAP BW Query has been run, and not always is the case.

Have you ever come accross such case?

Thanks a lot

Regards

entry.title: BW/4HANA endroutine clienthandling
entry.content:
Hello!

In a HANA runtime endroutine I'm consuming a CDS-View. In this View I'm using a function. I'm not able to active the transformation because SAP does not allows me to set amdp options cds session client as importing parameter in the generated amdp method GLOBAL_END.

Maybe is somebody facing the same issue?
BR

entry.title: SAP BW DTP dynamic filter multiple fields
entry.content:
Hello

is there a way to set the SAP BW DTP filter for multiple fields at once, or do i have to create for each field a routine?
